overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The player character moves from a waterfront promenade through a neon-lit commercial plaza with massive holographic billboards, then along covered walkways and finally descends to a lower dock level. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and reflections on wet surfaces.

events.description: turns left from street level to face the waterfront and city skyline across the water
begins walking along the waterfront promenade with blue railings visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, observing the rain-soaked city skyline across the water

entered.detail: metallic blue safety railing along the waterfront edge
distant futuristic cityscape with scattered neon lights visible across the water
dark water surface reflecting distant city lights
building with red and purple neon lighting visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked waterfront promenade at night. The camera holder walks along the blue-railed walkway, looking out across the water at the distant neon-lit city skyline. Heavy rain creates ripples on the water surface and wet reflections on the concrete path. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with steam rising from vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: exits waterfront promenade and enters the main commercial plaza with massive digital displays
camera tilts upward to reveal massive holographic billboards illuminating the area with bright neon light

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy commercial intersection, looking up at the towering holographic advertisements while navigating through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the crosswalk in front of the camera

entered.detail: towering vertical digital display showing advertisements with 'BELOW DECK' text visible
futuristic overpass with glowing red structural elements spanning the intersection
wet asphalt intersection with yellow crosswalk markings reflecting neon lights
large circular digital display structure wrapped around a building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bustling cyberpunk commercial plaza dominated by massive holographic billboards and neon signage. The camera moves through a scramble crosswalk surrounded by towering digital advertisements including a prominent 'BELOW DECK' display. Pedestrians navigate the wet streets while futuristic vehicles pass by. The elevated highway structure creates a canopy of red neon light over the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon-lit storefronts

events.description: enters covered walkway section with intense pink and red neon lighting overhead
futuristic red sports car passes by on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk beneath glowing pink neon structures, passing vending machines and storefronts

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car driving past on the adjacent road

entered.detail: overhead structure with glowing pink neon strips providing shelter from rain
bright green and pink illuminated vending machines lining the sidewalk
futuristic pedestrian or vehicle bridge with orange structural elements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway bathed in intense pink and magenta neon light. The overhead structure provides shelter from the rain while casting colored reflections on the wet pavement. Vending machines and shopfronts line the left side, while futuristic vehicles cruise by on the right. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic, featuring glowing strips of light and industrial architectural details.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with large commercial billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway and returns to open waterfront promenade with view of large advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront path, passing benches and palm trees while observing the large El Guapo billboard

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' with a stylized face graphic
tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
safety railing along the water's edge with red accents

segments.scene_description: The scene opens back up to the waterfront promenade, exposed to the rain but offering clear views of the water and city. A massive 'EL GUAPO' digital billboard dominates the right side, while palm trees sway in the background. The walkway is less crowded here, with benches for seating and street lamps providing additional lighting. Wet concrete reflects the colorful neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock stairs leading to water level

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs to lower dock level
reaches bottom of stairs and enters open dock platform area at water level

agents.ego_description: carefully descending wet concrete stairs toward the dock level, holding the railing for support

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with metal edges leading down to the dock
yellow and red metal safety railings along the stairwell
lower level concrete dock area at the water's edge with yellow safety barriers
bright artificial floodlight illuminating the stairwell wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a descent down a narrow concrete stairwell to a lower dock level. The environment becomes enclosed and industrial, with metal railings and artificial lighting replacing the neon-lit streets above. At the bottom, the camera emerges onto a dock platform at water level, with yellow safety rails and a view of the dark water and distant city lights across the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a moody, rain-soaked waterfront through a neon-saturated commercial district and back down to an industrial dock. It begins on a blue-railed promenade overlooking a distant skyline, where steam rises from vents and heavy rain ripples across the water. As the camera moves forward, the open air shifts into a bustling plaza dominated by towering holographic billboards and a red-lit highway canopy before transitioning into a semi-covered walkway bathed in intense pink and magenta neon. The scene then opens back up to the waterfront under the glow of a massive digital advertisement and swaying palm trees, where the wet concrete reflects the surrounding city lights. Finally, the camera descends a narrow concrete stairwell, leaving the vibrant neon behind to emerge onto a dark, industrial dock platform at water level.
